item_text: People here regularly seek to understand the needs of patients and make changes to better meet those needs.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: I have open lines of communication with everyone needed to make the change.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: I have access to data to help track changes in outcomes.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: The change is aligned with leadership goals.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: The change is aligned with clinician values.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: The article main-text list uses "Innovation Deliverers: Capability"; Supplementary Table S3 uses the singular label "Innovation Deliverer: Capability".

item_text: The change is compatible with existing clinical processes.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: The structures and policies in place here enable us to make the change.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: We have sufficient space to accommodate the change.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: One primary updated-CFIR construct per the article main-text mapping.

item_text: We have sufficient time dedicated to make the change.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: The article main-text list uses "Innovation Deliverers: Opportunity"; Supplementary Table S3 uses the singular label "Innovation Deliverer: Opportunity".

item_text: We have other needed resources to make the change (staff, money, supplies, etc.).
cfir_2022_construct_all: Available Resources: Materials & Equipment; Available Resources: Funding
cfir_2022_mapping_note: Supplementary Table S3 maps this item to both Available Resources: Materials & Equipment and Funding; the article main-text list of 14 primary constructs names Materials & Equipment.

item_text: People here see the current situation as intolerable and that the change is needed.

item_text: People here see the advantage of implementing this change versus an alternative change.
cfir_2022_mapping_note: The article main-text list uses "Innovation Relative Advantage"; Supplementary Table S3 uses the shorter label "Relative Advantage".

item_text: Higher level leaders are committed, involved, and accountable for the planned improvement.

item_text: Leaders I work with most closely are committed, involved, and accountable for the planned improvement.
